title: bupleurum boissieuanum
intro: Bupleurum boissieuanum, also known as Chinese Thorowax, is a medicinal plant in the parsley family native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which have been attributed to its bioactive compounds such as saikosaponins and buplerurin. The health benefits of Bupleurum boissieuanum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu, as well as its use in treating liver and kidney disorders. Bupleurum boissieuanum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, and tea, as well as being used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
